query: SELECT a.id as agendamento_id, a.status, c.nome as cliente, p.nome as profissional, a.valorTotal, COUNT(ags.id) as qtd_servicos FROM agendamentos a LEFT JOIN clientes c ON a.clienteId = c.id LEFT JOIN profissionais p ON a.profissionalId = p.id LEFT JOIN agendamento_servicos ags ON a.id = ags.agendamentoId GROUP BY a.id LIMIT 10;
